KNOWLEDGE CENTER

Free Retirement Planning Resources

Expert guides, checklists, and tools to help you make smarter retirement decisions.

WHY THESE DECISIONS MATTER

The retirement transition is high-stakes

One bad income year can trigger IRMAA

Cross a Medicare threshold by $1,000 and pay $700+/month in surcharges — for two years. Most people don't see it coming.

Tax decisions compound across decades

Roth conversions, withdrawal sequencing, and Social Security timing create ripple effects that either save or cost six figures over a retirement.

Federal benefits are complex by design

FERS, TSP, FEGLI, FEHB — most advisors don't know these acronyms, let alone how to optimize them together.

The wrong claiming age costs real money

Social Security at 62 vs. 70 can mean $200,000+ in lifetime difference. And the optimal age depends on factors most calculators ignore.

FREE RESOURCES

How Capital Wealth helps at every stage

Retirement Planning Mistakes to Avoid

The five critical mistakes that derail retirement plans — and the strategies that prevent them. Covers withdrawal sequencing, tax bracket management, and healthcare cost traps.

Get the Guide →

Social Security Claiming Strategy

When to claim, how spousal benefits work, and the tax implications of each scenario. Includes break-even analysis framework for your specific situation.

Read the Guide →

Tax Efficiency Checklist

A simple checklist to identify tax-saving opportunities: Roth conversion windows, IRMAA thresholds, charitable strategies, and Utah-specific deductions most retirees miss.

Get the Checklist →

Federal Employee Retirement Checklist

Navigate FERS pension, TSP withdrawal decisions, FEHB continuation, FEGLI cost analysis, and Social Security coordination — all in one comprehensive checklist.

Get the Checklist →

401(k) & IRA Rollover Guide

Leaving a job or consolidating accounts? Direct vs. indirect transfers, tax traps, and the decision framework for rollover vs. stay. Avoid the penalties that cost people thousands.

Read the Guide →

Medicare & IRMAA Planning Guide

Don't let surprise Medicare surcharges drain your retirement income. Understand the 2-year lookback, income thresholds, and multi-year avoidance strategies.

Read the Guide →

SCHEDULE CONSULTATION

Step 2) Comprehensive Analysis ▾

We model your income, taxes, healthcare, and estate plan with real numbers — not generic rules of thumb.

A clear plan that coordinates every piece: income, taxes, healthcare, and legacy.
